evals.name: full-pipeline-execution
evals.prompt: Start a cold start workflow on the churn data at eda-workspace/test-datasets/churn_data.csv. Target column is 'churned'. I want to go from raw data to a deployed dashboard.
evals.expected_output: Should execute the full 8-stage pipeline with reflection gates and report bus.

assertions.text: Creates project structure with necessary directories
Performs exploratory data analysis as first analytical step
Spawns analysis agents in parallel (EDA, ML theory, feature engineering)
Trains and selects a model with cross-validation
Builds an interactive dashboard (Streamlit or similar)
Deploys the application to a target environment
